findings.claim_text: Then, in June 2026, DeepSeek closed its first-ever external funding round — roughly 50 billion yuan (~$7.4B) at a post-money valuation near 350.88 billion yuan (~$52B), traced through a chain of minor indirect LPs in a Chinese regulatory filing [^16].
The number behind the quote is stark: Nvidia's China data-center revenue fell to $0 that quarter, down from $4.6B a year earlier [^47].
On raw performance, TileLang's own paper reports up to 5x speedup over Triton on Nvidia H100 and up to 6x on AMD GPUs, plus up to 90% code-size reduction for fused attention kernels [^8].
findings.contradicting_quote: I found that TileLang is much slower than the Triton baseline... Average time: 8.59 ms, 16.01 TFLOPs for TileLang versus 1.78 ms / 77.08 TFLOPs for Triton
